W1546 exposes W1539 semantic-adapter certificate readiness and accepted-route evidence on the final nonterminal surface, but it still depends on the W987 74-input ledger rather than constructing all 74 inputs from independent mathematical data.

Original four mathematical tasks remain open under the positive-witness supplement; the current route still relies on W987 constructor fields and stable-route comparison wrappers rather than a positive product witness.
